[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1000100100 3
2 0001011111 6
3 0100100111 5
4 1101110110 7
5 1001111000 5
6 1101000111 6
7 1110110111 8
